content:
The Centre for Advanced Research on Corporate and Insolvency Laws (CARCIL), Chanakya National Law University, Patna, is pleased to announce that the deadline for the submission of clarifications for Problem Statement of the CNLU–CARCIL National CIRP Simulation Competition, 2026 and General Information of the CNLU–CARCIL National Deal Negotiation Competition on FinTech Laws, 2026, organised as a part of the CNLU–CARCIL National Corporate Fest, 2026, has been extended to 14 July, 2026. 

Teams are encouraged to carefully review the General Information, Problem statement and the Competition Rulebook before submitting any queries through the official Clarifications Form.

Important Links:

Clarifications Form for CNLU–CARCIL National CIRP Simulation Competition, 2026: https://lnkd.in/dcPBcUa5

Clarifications Form for CNLU–CARCIL National Deal Negotiation Competition on FinTech Laws, 2026: https://lnkd.in/dEf6Egcd

Master Link for all competitions: https://lnkd.in/dExg-tHY


Prof. (Dr.) Ajay Kumar | Dr. Nandita S Jha | Hardik Awasthi | Shivam Singh | Nikhil Dwivedi | Tejas . | Ayush kumar gupta | Vishvajeet Rastogi | Saksham Shivam | Tanushree Singhal | Aditya Bhardwaj | Aman Rungta | Shalini Singh | Anuja Chatterjee | Aditya Kumar(Jha)
comment: An extended clarification window often improves the quality of questions too. Clearer queries now usually translate into fewer procedural disputes and more substantive competition rounds later.
